name: Number C104: Umbral Horror Masquerade
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カオス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０４ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仮面魔踏士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスカレード・マジシャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アンブラル
name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakuyon Masukarēdo Majishan Anburaru
desc:
4 Level 5 monsters
When this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target. If this card has "Number 104: Masquerade" as material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn, when a monster effect is activated on your opponent's field (Quick Effect): You can detach 1 material from this card; negate the activation, then you can send 1 random card from your opponent's hand to the GY, and if you do, halve your opponent's LP.

action: Sends from your opponent's hand to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
